vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: I am always compelled to whip out my phone whenever I encounter a picturesque landscape during my travels.

vocab.meaning: lột tả được cái hồn/bản chất
vocab.example: Through my lens, I strive to capture the essence of the natural world in its most candid moments.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng vẻ đẹp rực rỡ
vocab.example: Sometimes I prefer to just bask in the glory of a sunset rather than viewing it through a digital screen.
The way the natural light source hits the mountain peaks creates a dramatic effect that is perfect for photography.
To fully do justice to the vastness of the valley, I usually opt for a panoramic shot.
Taking photos in such a serene environment helps me decompress after a long week of work.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: I find that coastal views have a unique visual appeal due to the contrast between the turquoise water and the jagged rocks.
Looking out over the vast expanse of the desert makes you realize how insignificant our daily worries truly are.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị cản trở
vocab.example: The hotel balcony offered an unobstructed view of the bay, which was a dream come true for an amateur photographer like me.

vocab.meaning: hậu kỳ (chỉnh sửa ảnh sau khi chụp)
vocab.example: I spend quite a bit of time on post-processing to enhance the colors and make the scenery pop.
